content:
You're not wrong. There's barely any substantial footage of Mist sequence's gameplay and story to get invested into enough to care about the collaboration. So it doesn't hit as hard as it should.

SnU does have the full story on youtube, Steam and other storefronts for people to experience ,learn about and get invested in.
